name: agentic-engineering
description: AI-powered development tools. 32 agents, 7 workflow skills, 1 MCP server for code review, research, design, and workflow automation. Native Codex install ships skills, MCP, and safety hooks; agents via Bun --to codex.

interface.shortDescription: Skills, MCP, and safety hooks for agentic engineering workflows
interface.longDescription: Installs agentic-engineering skills, Context7 MCP, and safety-net hooks (block --no-verify, prevent main commits, block Slack webhooks, block prisma db push). Claude-style agents and slash commands are not part of the native Codex surface — use the Bun CLI convert path (--to codex) when you need full agent/command parity. Plugin hooks require review and trust in Codex before they run.
defaultPrompt: Run the plan → work → review → compound loop on this task.
Review this change for acceptance criteria and safety.
Set up lifecycle tracking for this repository.
